overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a journey from a crowded metro train interior through the neon-lit streets of Night City. The clip transitions from a first-person train ride to third-person exploration, passing iconic locations like Monroe & Sagan and the No-Tell Motel, with cherry blossoms visible against the dystopian skyline.

events.description: train accelerates, city lights begin streaming past windows
brighter neon lights flash through window as train passes illuminated buildings

agents.ego_description: sitting on metro train observing other passengers and city lights through windows

notable_agents.action: woman with short hair drinking from a green bottle while seated
group of passengers standing and holding poles near the train doors

entered.detail: futuristic metro seating with teal and grey upholstery
large windows showing passing city lights and neon signs
seated passenger with short dark hair drinking from green bottle

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic metro train car with moderate crowd density. Passengers stand and sit while holding poles, and neon city lights stream past the windows. The lighting is artificial and moody, with a greenish tint typical of the game's aesthetic.

events.description: exits train interior and enters street level outside Monroe & Sagan
passing under bright cyan and purple neon signs illuminating the street

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow neon-lit street passing storefronts and signs

notable_agents.action: character in pink pants standing near the Monroe & Sagan entrance

entered.detail: large cyan neon sign reading MONROE & SAGAN on building facade
illuminated advertisement poster on wall showing a character
purple neon strip lights running vertically along building edges

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the train and enters a narrow urban street dominated by the bright cyan Monroe & Sagan neon sign. The environment is sheltered between tall buildings with purple neon accents. A lone character stands near the entrance as the camera moves forward through the corridor-like space.

opens up to wide panoramic view of Night City skyline

agents.ego_description: moving along elevated walkway taking in the city vista and cherry blossoms

large holographic advertisement showing a head with wires
distinctive cylindrical skyscraper with red neon rings
dense cluster of skyscrapers with various neon signs

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wide elevated vista of Night City. A cherry blossom tree with falling pink petals stands in the foreground, contrasting with the dystopian cyberpunk skyline. The camera moves along a walkway with the CYBERHUB hologram visible on a building to the right, revealing the sprawling neon-lit cityscape under an overcast night sky.

events.description: accelerates rapidly through narrow passages between buildings
passes through narrow alley with walls close on both sides

agents.ego_description: speeding through narrow urban canyons and parking garage structures

entered.detail: cyan neon sign reading NO-TELL MOTEL on building side
multi-level concrete parking structure with blue painted levels
large vertical advertisement showing a food item
tight corridor between industrial buildings with pipes and vents

segments.scene_description: The camera accelerates through narrow urban canyons, passing the iconic NO-TELL MOTEL sign and moving through tight alleyways between industrial buildings. The environment shifts to a more claustrophobic setting with concrete parking garages and metal grates, maintaining the neon-lit aesthetic as it navigates the dense urban infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosed interior of a futuristic metro train into the sprawling, neon-drenched urban canyons of Night City. It begins inside a moody, greenish-tinted train car filled with passengers, with city lights streaming past the windows before the camera exits into a narrow street dominated by a bright cyan Monroe & Sagan sign. As the camera moves forward through this purple-accented corridor, the scene opens up to a wide elevated vista where a cherry blossom tree with falling pink petals contrasts against the distant CYBERHUB hologram and a sprawling dystopian skyline. The perspective then accelerates away from the open vista and dives back into the city's depths, passing the iconic No-Tell Motel sign. Finally, the environment shifts into a claustrophobic sequence of tight alleyways, concrete parking garages, and metal grates, weaving through the dense industrial infrastructure of the city.
